headline: Is Yum Brands (YUM) Price Around US$154 Leaving Upside On The Table
summary: Wondering if Yum! Brands at around US$154 is offering fair value right now, or if the price on your screen is missing part of the story? The stock has been relatively steady recently, with a 0.5% decline over the last 7 days and a 1.1% decline over the last 30 days, while still showing a 7.4% return over the past year and 39.0% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Yum! Brands as a large, established player in global quick service restaurants, with attention on how it manages its...

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
